zh.lifeSummary: 當Nigel d'Aubigny於1055年出生在法國諾門迪曼其沙吉馬-達奧比尼時，他的父親Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny46歲，母親Adeliza du Plessis28歲。他和Amicia Ferrers至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1107年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾可洛費爾享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Nigel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval name Nigellus, a Latinized version (ostensibly representing a diminutive of Latin niger ‘black’) of the vernacular Ni(h)el, i.e. Neil . Although it is frequently found in medieval records, this form was probably not used in everyday life before its revival by antiquarians such as Sir Walter Scott in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Nigel d'Aubigny was born in 1055, in Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, was 46 and his mother, Adeliza du Plessis, was 28. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Amicia Ferrers. He died about 1107, in Clophill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nigel d'Aubigny est né en 1055, à Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Adeliza du Plessis, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Amicia Ferrers. Il est décédé environ 1107, à Clophill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nigel d'Aubigny 1055 in Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny 46 und seine Mutter Adeliza du Plessis 28. Er hatte mit Amicia Ferrers mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1107 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Clophill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nigel d'Aubigny è nato il nel 1055 nel Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, Manche, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza du Plessis, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Amicia Ferrers. Morì circa 1107, nel Clophill, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nigel d'Aubignyが1055年にフランスノーマンディマンチェサイント-マルティン-ド'アウビグニーで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubignyは46歳，母Adeliza du Plessisは28歳であった。彼はAmicia Ferrersとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1107年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクロフィルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nigel d'Aubigny(이)가 1055년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 세인트-마틴-드'오비그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza du Plessis(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Amicia Ferrers(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1107년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 클로필에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nigel d'Aubigny родился в 1055 г. в местности сеинт-мартин-д'аубигни, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume d'Aubigny, seigneur de Saint-Martin-d'Aubigny было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza du Plessis, 28. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Amicia Ferrers. Он умер около 1107 г. в местности клофилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
